mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase discount rates on equity cash flows, compressing valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate drops below 4.5 percent, labor market tightness signals peak cyclical demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in less than 40 percent of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold being crossed.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts and nonfarm payrolls confirms broad-based economic expansion, lifting corporate earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 50 percent of observations over a 5-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and healthy aggregate supply, which supports equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth correlates with negative SPX returns in more than 70 percent of rolling 12-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation accelerates above 2.5 percent annually, the Federal Reserve is forced to tighten policy faster than markets price in, causing equity risk premiums to spike and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Inflation above 2.5 percent coincides with positive SPX 20d returns in more than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in retail and food services sales reflects expanding consumer spending, which directly boosts corporate revenue forecasts and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: RSAFS growth shows no predictive power for SPX 60d returns, with Rank IC remaining below 0.02 over four years.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid job creation exceeding 150,000 monthly gains alongside a stable unemployment rate confirms robust labor demand, reducing recession fears and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises above 150000 in three months
failure_condition: Strong payroll growth combined with stable unemployment yields negative SPX 20d returns in more than 55 percent of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding 2.5 percent annualized rate signals healthy economic momentum, which lifts equity risk appetite and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDP growth above 2.5 percent consistently precedes negative SPX 5d returns in more than 65 percent of quarterly observations.
